name: Churchill Capital Corp
description: Churchill Capital Corp was a public investment vehicle, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), founded by Michael Klein. The company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. In May 2019, Churchill Capital Corp completed its business combination with Clarivate Analytics, a global leader in providing trusted insights and analytics to accelerate the pace of innovation.
